{{Infobox icon
| name = Crown Icon
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] suspects the [[Netherworld Empress]]'s image resonates with a [[Crown Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Crown Icon]] represents nobility in the [[Netherworld Empress]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Crown Icon]] was one of the ideals [[Malice]] strove for.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Lindon began muttering. “Bow Icon, Shadow Icon, Strength Icon…is that the Crown Icon? It must be.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
